title: Pre-arrival services: Register for services - Canada.ca
content:
## Register for services
You and your dependants can register for free pre-arrival services to help you prepare for life in Canada. Register as soon as you’re eligible to make the most of the support available.
By registering, we can better assess your needs and match you with the right services.
Register in the Pre-arrival Client Registration and Referral Portal
Speak French? If you’re planning to settle outside Quebec , you can get pre-arrival services tailored to your needs.
Register with Connexions Francophones (in French only)

## What to expect when you register
- You can choose the services that fit your needs—all at once. This saves you time and helps match you with the right support.
- We’ll ask you to upload a document to confirm you’re eligible for services.
- Program representatives will reach out to you to get things started.
If you prefer to contact programs directly
If you’d rather connect with programs individually, explore the following:
- Prepare to live in Canada
- Prepare to work in Canada

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
